programs.programName: New York State Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS) Waiver Programs

verified.notes: The search results provided do not contain eligibility criteria (age, income, or asset limits) or a main phone number for applying to or getting help with New York's HCBS Waiver programs. The results confirm the program exists and is administered by OPWDD, with the current waiver renewal effective October 1, 2024 through September 30, 2029, and a 2025 amendment approved April 1, 2025. To obtain this information, direct contact with OPWDD or review of the full waiver document at opwdd.ny.gov would be required.

programs.programName: Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE)

verified.notes: PACE is a federal program with state implementation; eligibility is based on age (55+), dual Medicare/Medicaid eligibility, and nursing home level of care need rather than income/asset limits. No specific income or asset thresholds found in search results. Phone contact information not provided in available sources. For current official details, consult NY Department of Health or CMS directly.
